title: Come Away With Me
notes:
Recorded at Sorcerer Sound, New York City and Allaire Studios, Shokan, NY.
Mixed at Sear Sound, New York City.
Mastered at Sterling Sound.

Manufactured By Caroline Distribution, 104 W. 29th Street, New York, NY 10001

Spine and labels report BTE 32088 as first identifier. 
Spine also shows a "Music from EMI", 

on scale, vinyl only: 125g

identifiers.value: BTE-32088-1 A RE1 THFM J.Y.  S-64484
